compat/compat: Chrome >= 49, Edge >= 79, Firefox >= 49, Safari >= 10, iOS >= 10, Android >= 5

no-restricted-syntax.message: Some older browsers reject `for (const … of …)` with a SyntaxError; use an indexed `for` or `.forEach()`.
`URL.prototype.searchParams` is undefined on some older browsers (observed on Chrome 49-50 macOS High Sierra); build query strings with `encodeURIComponent` instead.
